channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter everywhere, 11th April
item.description:
Litter all around bus stop Y at Deptford bridge next to Co Op. In flower bed and bush behind bus stop. This area is NOT cleaned weekly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags left on top of litter bin, 11th April
item.description:
Someone in the neighborhood left rubbish bags on top of the existing litter bins. This is a recurring issues, and every time the morning after the street is covered in rubbish as a result of foxes activity. I understand there is a CCTV camera in that exact spot. Maybe that can be used to identify the responsible, who seems to follow a pattern of habit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104a-f, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three rolls royces are still parked here. They take up several parking spaces which could be used by visitors using the shops., 11th April
item.description:
They have not been moved at all for several months and appear to be suing the spaces as free storage.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Dulwich Village, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken water meter cover — open chamber, trip hazard, 11th April
item.description:
That water meter cover had been cracked for a long time until yesterday when it got completely destroyed and is now a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbrooke Crescent, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole part of road needs fixing, 11th April
item.description:
It’s been like it for weeks and getting bigger and deeper
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Lingfield Crescent, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Some rubble left on the dropped kerb, 11th April
item.description:
There is some sort of concrete rubble left on the dropped kerb of the pavement along Onega Gate, by the turning into Plover Way. Please could this be cleared away. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Onega Gate, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of household debris, 11th April
item.description:
This area is frequently used for fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins & fly-tipping, 11th April
item.description:
Recycling bins used as a dumping site

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mabley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
Fly tipping near public recreational areas and risk to public and for a long time and getting worst since a months. Along watery lane leading to Queen Mary’s hospital right side field and opposite horse field.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frognal Place, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping Trolley left in road, 11th April
item.description:
Shopping trolley left in street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marina Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light 17 not working, 11th April
item.description:
This light pole was fitted with an EV charger and it has stopped working since, creating a dangerously dark stretch of road in Dunston rs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old sofas dumped on the pavement., 11th April
item.description:
Old sofas have been dumped on the pavement directly outside where The Leather Bottle pub used to be. Complete eyesore and a hazard to anyone in a wheelchair or pushing a pram/buggy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heron Hill, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Always full of rubbish, 11th April
item.description:
This spot is always filthy and disgusting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Union Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes, 11th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lodge Drive, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of Smelly liquid across footpath, 11th April
item.description:
Health hazard. Smells like a blocked old drain: sour decay. Probably a leak from bin area. Puddle of fluid inside the bin area. It’s leaked onto the alley and covers nearly the entire width of the alley. Flows down into the car park, where there are two more substantial puddles. The rest of the area has loads of discarded junk that has been there for a while. This is usual for this location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Product spread on oil slick, 11th April
item.description:
The oil sick has been covered with an unknown green/blue product. It has been blown by the wind on to the pavement, down the drain, along the road and on to the driveway, into the garage and porch of No 1 causing a disgusting mess. We are both in our eighties and would prefer not to have the arduous task of continually clearing away the ‘product’. May I respectfully suggest the ‘product’ is removed forthwith.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesley Close, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Exposed live cable, 11th April
item.description:
I have twisted the cable to make it as safe as possible but a dog walker pointed it out to me after his dog received an electric shock so it is definitely live

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Widespread fly tipping, glass hazard, 11th April
item.description:
Regular fly tipping including dangerous glass bottles and broken glass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two black bags of rubbish dumped on pavement., 11th April
item.description:
As above.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Siward Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorbike dumped in ally way, 11th April
item.description:
Partly disassembled motor cycle dumped in alleyway behind Ramsden Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ramsden Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
